hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))"); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.env$'; then echo 'BLOCK: .env contains API keys — do not edit it'; exit 1; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))"); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'requirements\.txt$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not overwrite requirements.txt — use Edit to add individual deps'; exit 1; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))"); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'agents/.*\.py$'; then cd /Users/prakashtupe/lead-automation && python3 -c 'import agents' 2>&1 || echo 'WARNING: Agent import check failed — fix before continuing'; fi
